summary: P2 Features Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed. Redis/Celery setup working, SaaS templates expanded to 24, Cloudflare Pages deployment option added.

minor.issue: Line 12 had DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL and REDIS_URL concatenated without newline - FIXED

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/celery/stats - Returns celery_available:true with job counts
✅ All 8 original SaaS templates present (analytics, marketplace, subscription_box, saas_boilerplate, ai_tool, community, course_platform, appointment_booking)

✅ All 16 new SaaS templates present (crm, project_management, helpdesk, invoice_billing, email_marketing, survey_forms, hr_platform, social_scheduler, link_shortener, newsletter, job_board, document_signing, fitness_app, event_platform, real_estate, podcast_platform)
✅ CRM template has correct structure (name, features, pricing_tiers, tech_stack)
✅ GET /api/cloud-deploy/status - Shows Vercel and Cloudflare platforms
critical_code_review_comments: Redis is running and Celery is connected (celery_available: true)
Celery job submission creates jobs with proper structure (id, project_id, job_type, status, priority)
SaaS templates correctly expanded from 8 to 24 with all required new templates
Cloud deploy status correctly shows both Vercel (connected) and Cloudflare (needs CLOUDFLARE_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT)
MOCKED: Cloudflare actual deployment requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID to be set in backend/.env
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test projects from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features all verified: 1) Redis running and Celery available (celery_available:true), 2) SaaS templates expanded to 24, 3) Cloudflare Pages option added to cloud-deploy status. Note: Cloudflare deployment is MOCKED without credentials - needs CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID. Vercel deployment has credentials configured and shows connected:true.
